---
title: "main.tsx"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/main.tsx"
loc: 6
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.70
style_score: 9.54
intel_score: 8.07
overall_score: 9.08
---

## Intent
React component rendering main with 1 logic branches. It exists to provide a responsive interface element for real-time telemetry. Its role in the system is to project background Daemon activity into the visual Sovereign HUD plane.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://react)
- [*](file://react-dom/client)
- [App](file://./App.js)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
